name: docsbot-agent-skills
description: Agent Skills for DocsBot Administration and related DocsBot agent workflows.

skills.name: docsbot-administration
skills.description: Administer DocsBot teams, bots, sources, members, integrations, Skills, reporting, supported billing settings, and production bot-building workflows through the OAuth-authenticated DocsBot Administration server.

skills.name: docsbot-documentation-search
skills.description: Search and fetch indexed documentation, knowledge base, website, file, and training-source content from a specific DocsBot bot.

skills.name: docsbot-question-history
skills.description: Search and fetch prior DocsBot questions, answers, conversations, escalation state, answerability, sentiment, and support history for a specific bot.
